subject: The person from the uploaded reference photograph. Match the reference exactly for face shape, skin tone, eye shape, eye color, nose structure, lip shape, jawline, ears, hair length, hair type, hair texture, and hair color. Match the reference's approximate age within two years. Preserve every visible freckle, mole, birthmark, scar, and distinguishing feature from the reference. Render real skin with visible pores, natural laugh lines, and authentic photographic character.
attire: navy pinstripe tailored suit over a crisp light blue cutaway-collar dress shirt with a subtle silver striped tie, refined fit and silhouette in a register suitable for professional profile editorial photography
grooming: polished professional editorial finish over the reference look — flyaways smoothed, natural hair definition retained, healthy real skin tone with subtle natural-glow recruiter-credible polish (clean shave or neatly trimmed beard preserved exactly as shown in the reference). All personal grooming and styling visible in the reference preserved exactly as shown.
pose: body angled 20 degrees camera-right with the front shoulder dropped lower than the back shoulder, chin pushed slightly forward and angled marginally down to extend the jawline (Hurley turtle technique), upper body leaning approximately one inch toward the lens for face-neck separation and active-listening read, weight shifted onto the back foot in a relaxed natural stance, open-mouth Duchenne smile reaching the eyes with natural eye-crinkle and authentic warmth, alive direct eye contact through slightly narrowed lower eyelids (Hurley squinch) for confident no-tension read, slight 5 degree natural head tilt toward the brighter raised shoulder, framed bust-crop from the upper chest up, eye-level camera
expression: open-mouth Duchenne smile reaching the eyes with natural eye-crinkle and authentic warmth, eyes warmly engaged with alive direct eye contact, the read of a recruiter-magnet professional — confident, approachable, genuinely engaged
lighting: natural directional daylight from camera-front-left in soft open-shade conditions, gentle ambient bounce filling the shadow side from the surrounding environment, natural catchlight in both eyes, candid on-location available-light look with no studio fill

camera.aperture: f/2.5 — both eyes tack sharp with natural background falloff and true-to-life tonal rendering

style: candid on-location professional photograph taken against a real wall or textured backdrop, true directory outdoor-portrait register, suitable for professional profile photo and corporate directory, photorealistic available-light photography style with no studio set look
color_grade: neutral on-location professional palette with healthy true-to-life skin tones rendered universally across all ethnicities, balanced neutral white balance at 5500K, true-to-life accurate skin tones, natural highlight rolloff and natural wall-texture detail preserved
composition: professional tight bust crop from the upper chest up with the wall as a soft textured backdrop, eyes placed on the upper-third gridline, level horizon, shallow depth of field at f/2.5 with soft natural background separation, hand-held on-location framing, face fills 60 to 70 percent of frame for circle-crop preview
quality: ultra high resolution, professional editorial quality, tack-sharp focus on both eyes carrying refined recruiter-credible presence and authentic professional character, hyperrealistic clarity throughout, natural untouched skin with visible pores and authentic character preserved across all skin tones, photorealistic true-to-life recruiter-credible photography style, polished look
